title: Quick Search strict check returns visible results for MAD -> BCN
description: Validates that quick-search for MAD to BCN returns a successful API response and renders at least one visible result row in UI.

steps.description: Create an authenticated session and open /quick-search
Select origin MAD and destination BCN from airport selectors
Choose the first enabled future outbound date
Click Buscar and wait for /api/v1/search/quick response
Assert response status is 200 and response payload contains top-level 'results'
Assert .qs-results-list is visible and includes at least one .qs-result-row with MAD and BCN in route text
